title: じゃじゃウマ姫のパーティー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess and I have been invited to a
party held by one of King Halo's acquaintances.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
W-wooow! So... this is what a first-rate party is
like! Wh-what a magnificent venue, and such
amazing food!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Kawakami? Do you remember what
to do first when arriving at a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Eh? Ah, um, of course! Umm... I need to, uh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I need to hoard all the most delicious food
before anyone else gets a chance!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No! You're supposed to greet the party organizer!
Come on, we prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh!
choice_data_list: Now, now. No need to be so harsh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't spoil her! I understand that she's nervous,
but she's only going to embarrass herself at this
rate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, Kawakami, pull yourself together and
let's go greet the organizer! I'll come with you, so
look dignified!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't King! How long has it been? It's so
good to see you again!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it has been some time since we last spoke. I'd
like to introduce you to my classmate, Kawa—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A p-pleasure to make your acquaintance, and
how do you do?! I am Kawakami Princess! Yes, it
is very nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, it's nice to see someone so enthusiastic!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! Oh, I did it! You know, it was King who
taught me what to do! "When greeting someone,
project your voice loudly and clearly!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
W-well, let's not dwell on that, shall we?
Moving on... I heard you did some work with my
mother recently, is that right?

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. She truly is a world-class designer. Her
recent work was positively perfect. I have nothing
but gratitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no need for that. She's the one who's grateful
for all the help you give—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aaahhh! That just gave me a hilarious idea!
Speaking of help, King is always helping me, too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: K-Kawakami?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That is... except the other day when I broke a
teacup for the eighteenth time. She got so mad.
She was like, "Clean this up at once! And don't
ask for help!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Which leads to my knockout princess joke! What
would King give me if I were to spill hot tea
everywhere?

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text: ...I don't know. What would she give you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Why, a proper scalding, of course!

text_block_list.name: Party Organizer
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just what do you think you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, Kawakami! You're lucky our host is
a man of great tolerance. If it were anyone else,
you might've been kicked out!
choice_data_list: L-look, at least she was giving it her best shot...
Could you teach her proper etiquette?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "Shot"? More like her best active grenade!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
P-please don't be mad! I just thought it was a
great chance to bust out a witty princess joke!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What? Have you realized the folly of what you
did?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Um, what does a furious King have in common
with the wonderful steak they served at the
party?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: They were both steaming! How's that one?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not funny at all! Come here at once, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Please forgive meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Kawakami Princess is still a ways away
from conducting herself in a manner befitting a
princess.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I'll simply have to drill the
fundamentals into her once again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I truly did study in preparation for this
party. I learned all about the art of witty
conversation...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You would have been better off spending that
time studying etiquette.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, I won't deny that it can be important to slip
in a small joke during situations like that...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! So my judgment was spot on?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, it was still unacceptable! For instance, why
was I the butt of your joke?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: E-eeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Kawakami Princess starts taking joke
lessons from King Halo three times a week.
